---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages from the browser console.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17)
- **Device:** (e.g. iPhone 15, MacBook, Android)
- **Deployment:** (e.g. self-hosted on Vercel, local dev)
- **Next.js version:** (from `package.json`)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem — e.g. does it happen consistently or intermittently? Only on specific pages?

---

> **Security vulnerabilities:** If this bug could expose personal data or credentials, please follow the [responsible disclosure process](../SECURITY.md) instead of filing a public Issue.
